detail.downgrade.tip: Install the selected lower version (winget only)
detail.envVars.hint: Dev toolchains: a winget install usually adds itself to PATH automatically; if you need JAVA_HOME / ANDROID_HOME etc., configure them here manually.
detail.envVars.tip: Open the environment-variables page to configure PATH / JAVA_HOME etc. manually
detail.install.tip: Install this software at the selected version
detail.manualDownload.tip: This software must be downloaded and installed manually from its homepage
detail.pathHint.portable: Extraction directory for the portable package / git; editable
detail.pathHint.winget: Leave blank = default location; if set, uses winget --location (supported by some software)
detail.stop.tip: Stop all processes of this software
detail.uninstall.confirmBody:
Uninstall {0}?

[Yes] Completely remove (including user data)
[No] Uninstall only, keep data
[Cancel] Do nothing
detail.update.tip: winget upgrade / git pull / re-pull portable package, updating to the latest version
detail.version.tip: Choose the version to install (latest by default)
